description:
Orpheus TTS is a state-of-the-art, Llama-based Speech-LLM designed for high-quality, empathetic text-to-speech generation. Send a text prompt to voice it. 

Optional parameters:
Choose from one of the available voices (`tara`, `leah`, `jess`, `leo`, `dan`,`mia`, `zac`, `zoe`). Officially supported sound effects are: <laugh>, <chuckle>, <sigh>, <cough>, <sniffle>, <groan>, <yawn>, <gasp>, and <giggle>.
